title: $\texttt{SPIN}$: distilling $\texttt{Skill-RRT}$ for long-horizon prehensile and non-prehensile manipulation
title_zh: SPIN：蒸馏Skill-RRT用于长时程抓取与非抓取操作
abstract:
Current robots struggle with long-horizon manipulation tasks requiring sequences of prehensile and non-prehensile skills, contact-rich interactions, and long-term reasoning. We present $\texttt{SPIN}$ ($\textbf{S}$kill $\textbf{P}$lanning to $\textbf{IN}$ference), a framework that distills a computationally intensive planning algorithm into a policy via imitation learning.
We propose $\texttt{Skill-RRT}$, an extension of RRT that incorporates skill applicability checks and intermediate object pose sampling for solving such long-horizon problems. To chain independently trained skills, we introduce $\textit{connectors}$, goal-conditioned policies trained to minimize object disturbance during transitions. High-quality demonstrations are generated with $\texttt{Skill-RRT}$ and distilled through noise-based replay in order to reduce online computation time. The resulting policy, trained entirely in simulation, transfers zero-shot to the real world and achieves over 80\% success across three challenging long-horizon manipulation tasks and outperforms state-of-the-art hierarchical RL and planning methods.
abstract_zh: 当前机器人在需要一系列抓取与非抓取技能、密集接触交互和长期推理的长时程操作任务中表现不佳。我们提出SPIN（技能规划到推理），一个通过模仿学习将计算密集型规划算法蒸馏为策略的框架。我们提出Skill-RRT，一种扩展的RRT算法，通过引入技能适用性检查和中间物体位姿采样来解决此类长时程问题。为了串联独立训练的技能，我们引入连接器（connectors），即目标条件策略，旨在最小化过渡期间的物体扰动。使用Skill-RRT生成高质量演示，并通过基于噪声的重放进行蒸馏，以减少在线计算时间。最终策略完全在仿真中训练，零样本迁移到真实世界，在三个具有挑战性的长时程操作任务中成功率超过80%，并优于最先进的层次化强化学习和规划方法。
tldr_zh: 通过蒸馏Skill-RRT规划器，实现长时程抓取与非抓取操作的高效策略。
cover_zh: 机器人也能玩转长链条操作？这个新框架让技能串联零失误
